post.description: Decodes calldata (4-byte selector + args) into a name→value map using the given function signature. Parameter names are used as keys; falls back to "arg0", "arg1", … when the signature has no names.
Decodes the raw hex output of an eth_call into human-readable values given a list of ABI types

parameters.description: ABI types and hex-encoded return data
parameters.name: body

post.description:
Returns the ABI-encoded calldata (4-byte selector + packed arguments) for the given signature and args.
Signature must be in canonical form — no spaces, no parameter names (e.g. "transfer(address,uint256)").
Supported types: address | bool | string | bytes | bytes1–bytes32 | uint8/16/32/64/128/256 | int8/16/32/64/128/256
Tuple, array, and slice types are not yet supported.
Returns ABI-encoded calldata for eip712Domain()
Returns the 4-byte selector for the given function signature
Returns the current nonces(address) value for an owner on a permit-compatible contract
Resolves name, version, chain_id, and verifying_contract for a contract
Returns the formatted token allowance of a spender for an owner
Simulates approve(address,uint256) via eth_call and returns the bool result
Returns the formatted token balance of an account
Returns ABI-encoded calldata for allowance(address,address)
Returns ABI-encoded calldata for approve(address,uint256)
Returns ABI-encoded calldata for balanceOf(address)
Returns ABI-encoded calldata for transfer(address,uint256)
Returns ABI-encoded calldata for transferFrom(address,address,uint256)
Returns name, symbol, and decimals for an ERC-20 contract
Prepends the EIP-191 personal sign prefix ("\x19Ethereum Signed Message:\n" + length) to the message and returns the Keccak256 hash — matches the digest produced by eth_sign / personal_sign
post.summary: Compute Keccak256 hash with EIP-191 prefix

post.description: Parses the function signature to derive the type schema, builds the EIP-712 typed data from domain and args, and returns the digest (\x19\x01 || domainSeparator || hashStruct(message))
Computes the Keccak256 hash of the given message with no prefix applied (no EIP standard)
Proxies a raw JSON-RPC call to the connected node and returns the result as-is
Returns the balance for the given address at the specified block in decimal and hex
Returns the latest block number in decimal and hex
Executes eth_call and returns the raw result
Returns the chain ID of the connected network as a decimal integer
Returns the deployed code for the given address and whether it is a contract
Returns the latest block baseFeePerGas in decimal and hex
Returns max_fee_per_gas calculated as base_fee_per_gas * 2 + max_priority_fee_per_gas
Returns the recommended priority fee per gas in decimal and hex
post.summary: Get max priority fee per gas

post.description: Returns the estimated gas limit for the given transaction parameters
Returns the current gas price in decimal and hex
Returns the pending transaction count (nonce) for the given address as a decimal integer
Returns transaction details for the given tx hash
Returns the transaction receipt for the given tx hash
Broadcasts a signed raw transaction with eth_sendRawTransaction
Signs a hex-encoded 32-byte digest with the given private key using raw secp256k1 ECDSA. Hashing is the caller's responsibility — use the hash endpoints to produce the digest before calling this.
Recovers the uncompressed secp256k1 public key and Ethereum address from a 32-byte hash and a recoverable ECDSA signature in [R || S || V] format
post.summary: Recover public key and address from a signature

post.description: Decodes an unsigned EIP-1559 payload, signs it with the key for the given address, and returns the signed raw transaction and tx hash
post.summary: Sign an unsigned dynamic fee native transfer transaction

post.description: Decodes an unsigned EIP-155 legacy RLP, signs it with the key for the given address, and returns the signed raw transaction and tx hash
Recovers the signer's address from the signature via ecrecover and compares it against the provided address
post.summary: Verify a signature against an address

post.description: Recovers the signer's public key from the signature via ecrecover and compares it against the provided public key
post.summary: Verify a signature against a public key

post.description: Returns the EIP-55 mixed-case checksum encoding for the given address
post.summary: Convert address to EIP-55 checksum format

post.description: Returns the public key and address derived from the given private key
post.summary: Derive key set from private key

post.description: Converts a decimal amount from one Ethereum unit to another
post.summary: Convert amount between wei, gwei, and ether

post.description: Constructs an unsigned EIP-1559 transaction for native ETH transfer and returns the encoded signing payload and signing hash
post.summary: Build an unsigned dynamic fee native transfer transaction

post.description: Constructs an unsigned EIP-155 legacy transaction for native ETH transfer and returns the RLP encoding and signing hash
post.summary: Build an unsigned legacy native transfer transaction

post.description: Builds transfer(address,uint256) calldata internally and returns the unsigned RLP-encoded EIP-1559 transaction. Gas limit is estimated on-chain with a 20% buffer.
post.summary: Build unsigned ERC-20 EIP-1559 transfer tx

post.description: Builds transfer(address,uint256) calldata internally and returns the unsigned RLP-encoded EIP-155 legacy transaction. Gas limit is estimated on-chain with a 20% buffer.
post.summary: Build unsigned ERC-20 legacy transfer tx

post.description: Fetches chain state (chainID, nonce, fees) and returns the unsigned RLP-encoded EIP-1559 transfer transaction
Fetches chain state (chainID, nonce, gas price) and returns the unsigned RLP-encoded EIP-155 legacy transfer transaction
Builds transfer(address,uint256) calldata, estimates gas, signs with the configured key, returns unsigned_rlp, signed_rlp, and tx_hash
post.summary: Build and sign ERC-20 EIP-1559 transfer tx

post.description: Builds transfer(address,uint256) calldata, estimates gas, signs with the configured key, returns unsigned_rlp, signed_rlp, and tx_hash
post.summary: Build and sign ERC-20 legacy transfer tx

post.description: Fetches chain state, builds and signs an EIP-1559 native transfer, returns unsigned_rlp, signed_rlp, and tx_hash
post.summary: Build and sign EIP-1559 transfer tx

post.description: Fetches chain state, builds and signs an EIP-155 legacy native transfer, returns unsigned_rlp, signed_rlp, and tx_hash
post.summary: Build and sign legacy transfer tx

post.description: Builds transfer(address,uint256) calldata, estimates gas, signs with the configured key, broadcasts, and returns unsigned_rlp, signed_rlp, tx_hash, r, s, v
post.summary: Build, sign, and send ERC-20 EIP-1559 transfer tx

post.description: Builds transfer(address,uint256) calldata, estimates gas, signs with the configured key, broadcasts, and returns unsigned_rlp, signed_rlp, tx_hash, r, s, v
post.summary: Build, sign, and send ERC-20 legacy transfer tx

post.description: Fetches chain state, builds and signs an EIP-1559 native transfer, broadcasts it, and returns unsigned_rlp, signed_rlp, tx_hash, r, s, v
post.summary: Build, sign, and send EIP-1559 transfer tx

post.description: Fetches chain state, builds and signs an EIP-155 legacy native transfer, broadcasts it, and returns unsigned_rlp, signed_rlp, tx_hash, r, s, v
post.summary: Build, sign, and send legacy transfer tx
